rules.newtab: Opens the link in a new tab

error.yaml: The YAML code contains syntax errors
error.req-boolean: The value must be a boolean (true/false)
error.req-array: The value must be a YAML array
error.req-string: The value must be a text

error.unknown-key: The following key is not supported

users.subtitle: Manage accounts, authentication type, and group membership
users.tablehint: Edit profiles, assign groups, and remove unused accounts
users.askdelete: Are you sure you want to delete the user

groups.subtitle: Manage groups and their descriptions
groups.tablehint: Create, edit, and remove available groups
groups.name: Group name
groups.askdelete: Are you sure you want to delete the group

acl.subtitle: Define which views are public or restricted to groups
acl.tablehint: Enable protection on a view, then select allowed groups

edit.name: Name
edit.subtitle: Manage sources, items, views, and secrets

edititem.subtitle: Edit HTML template, JavaScript script, and linked sources for this item

global.docsbytype: Each section contains its own dedicated documentation

bootstrap.description: Use Bootstrap classes in your HTML code to unify and customize the visual rendering of your items. The documentation contains many examples for each desired rendering.

icons.description: Use Font Awesome or Bootstrap icons to display items. The documentation contains many examples for each desired rendering.

datatable.description: DataTables allows you to easily add search, sorting, export, and pagination to your HTML tables. To use the Bootstrap theme, add the 'table' class. Refer to the documentation for examples and more information.

mermaid.description: Mermaid allows you to create diagrams. Must be contained in a 'pre' tag with the class 'mermaid'. Refer to the documentation for more information.

nunjucks.description: Nunjucks allows you to define templates. Use the data from your sources to build your structure on these data (loops, conditions, ...). Refer to the documentation for more information.

date.description: Allows to manipulate the format of dates.

find.description: Allows to search for a value in an array of objects and return the first object that matches.

fromjson.description: Allows to convert a JSON string to an object.

setattribute.description: Allows to modify an attribute of an object.

split.description: Allows splitting a string into an array using a separator.

javascript.description: The JavaScript code is executed after the HTML code and can use Nunjucks. It is important to note that each datalchemist object can contain its own associated JavaScript code, so it is recommended to avoid potential conflicts with other objects by using unique variable or function names and minimizing the impact on the global environment.

type.execute: Execute a command or a script

editsource.subtitle: Configure source type, output format, and retrieval logic
editsource.config_help: Define connector, output format, and related parameters
editsource.secrets_hint: Secrets are available in source templates (backend processing):

database.helper: See the help on the right for more information about the connection string syntax.

file.helper: Path of the file on the server where datalchemist is executed.

execute.helper: Command or script that will be executed by the application. The standard output must correspond to the selected format.

text.helper: Enter the item in the selected language. The JINJA syntax is valid.

editview.subtitle: Build your view in grid or row mode and fine-tune the visual layout
editview.config_help: Add items, adjust sizing, and organize row/column composition

home.message: If you have a default view configured in the parameters, you will be redirected to it, otherwise you can explore the application from here

save.label: Save
save.nosave: Do you really want to leave without saving changes ?
